nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holcombe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Holcomb  .

variants.name: Holcomb
meanings: English (Surrey and Sussex): habitational name from any of several places called Holcombe (Devon, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Lancashire, Oxfordshire, Somerset), from Old English hol ‘hollow’ + cumb ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Lady de Holcombe was born after 1105. She married Symon de Holcombe in Hull, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1156, in Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady de Holcombeは1105年以後に生まれた。イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングハルでSymon de Holcombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1156年以後にイギリスデボンで死去した。

ko.Probably Hull, Devon Co., England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Lady de Holcombe(은)는 1105년 이후 태어났다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 훌에서 Symon de Holcombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1156년 이후 영국 데폰에서 사망했다.
